title: Add more network info ipv4/ipv6 to inspect and be more compatible with docker
body:
This add gateway/prefixlen and IPv6 output to inspect.

Changes the IPv4 and IPv6 addresses to string so it's compatible with docker. 
I think that additional IP addresses should go to SecondaryIPAddresses and SecondaryIPv6Addresses.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

bot, add author to whitelist
bot, test pull request

@42wim Thanks for the PR, should we setup a field for secondary addresses in this PR?
@mheon @baude PTAL
I'm OK with leaving multiple addresses out of this PR for now. I don't see us encountering that kind of CNI config particularly often.
@42wim Looks like your commit is missing a signoff - please add one with `git commit -s --amend`

:pushpin: Commit a31f1ff has been approved by `mheon`
